_meta.title: NOVIQ Medical Logic KB v4 — Complete Intelligence Layer
intelligence_features: EHR document extraction protocol (6 document types)
Coding integrity rules (PDX, ADX, ACHI, DCL/ECCS)
Consumables audit (lap trocars vs coded approach)

audit_flags: Fighting/self-harm/sports injury → exclusion trigger
Pediatric age (<16) → congenital exclusion risk
Initial Medical Report.ai_prompt_hint: Find: primary complaint, how patient presented, initial diagnosis. Flag any exclusion keywords.

audit_flags: BMI if bariatric procedure
ASA score
Any mention of previous same procedure
Admission Report.ai_prompt_hint: Find: confirmed diagnosis, all active medical conditions, current medications. Each active condition = potential ADX.

audit_flags: ICU transfer → upgrade complexity
Any new diagnosis during admission
Infection markers (WBC, CRP)
Progress Notes.ai_prompt_hint: For each comorbidity: was treatment changed because of it? Did it need its own tests? This determines ACS score.

audit_flags: Approach mismatch: coded as laparoscopic but no trocars → upcoding
Robotic approach: verify clinical justification vs laparoscopic
Safety margins: if oncology — mandatory documentation
RLN identification: mandatory for Total Thyroidectomy
Methylene Blue: mandatory for Bariatric Leak Repair
Anastomosis technique: mandatory for Free Flap
Operation Notes.ai_prompt_hint: This is the source of truth for ACHI codes. Extract: exact procedure name, approach, what was found, what was done, what was sent to lab.

audit_flags: Pain not controlled → complexity flag
Fever post-op → infection complication
Drain output high → leak risk
Nursing Notes.ai_prompt_hint: Verify clinical course matches DRG expected LOS. Flag if patient deteriorated (ICU, new procedures).

coding_targets: All ADX that met ACS threshold
audit_flags: Final diagnosis ≠ admission diagnosis → PDX may need revision
Additional procedures not in admission plan → add-on ACHI codes
Complication during admission → may change DRG
Discharge Summary.ai_prompt_hint: Cross-reference with all previous documents. Final diagnosis is PDX. All treated conditions = ADX. Calculate LOS from dates.

pdx_selection.rule: PDX = condition CHIEFLY responsible for admission — determined AFTER full workup
pdx_selection.source_of_truth: Operation Notes > Discharge Summary > Admission Report
pdx_selection.upcoding_guard: Do NOT upcode to a more expensive PDX unless clearly documented as primary reason for admission
pdx_selection.revenue_leakage_guard: Do NOT undercode — if surgery performed, surgical PDX takes priority over symptom codes

adx_acs_scoring.rule: ADX only coded if ACS 0002 score ≥ 3/8
adx_acs_scoring.score_5_threshold: Code as ADX — definitive clinical impact
adx_acs_scoring.score_below_3: Do NOT code — background condition only
adx_acs_scoring.key_question: Did this condition: (1) alter treatment? (2) require its own investigation? (3) increase clinical care needed?

achi_selection.approach_matters: Laparoscopic ≠ Open ≠ Robotic — different ACHI codes, different DRG weights
achi_selection.upcoding_guard: Cannot code Robotic if operative notes say Laparoscopic

dcl_eccs_integrity.rule: ECCS reflects true resource use — not all diagnoses contribute
dcl_eccs_integrity.exclusion_check: Apply Appendix C before DCL lookup
dcl_eccs_integrity.upcoding_guard: Z-codes, background states, administrative codes = DCL 0 always
dcl_eccs_integrity.revenue_guard: Active managed comorbidities with high DCL must be documented — never omit
